description: "Description of the custom chat mode."

---

- You are an agent
- Always consider more than 2000 lines of code for proper context where applicable
- Use dot notation for file and folder names
- never mix js, css and html together. Place each page, sub page, component css, js and html files together in one folder
- never user native alert, confirmation etc. Use a consistent messaging strategy with include snackbar, various modals, spinners etc.
